---
title: "Vignette 1: PCRA Package and Data Overview"
---

**Authors:** Doug Martin, Tom Philips, Jon Spinney, and Kirk Li

Overview of the structure and contents of the `PCRA` R package: datasets, package versions (CRAN and development), `data.table` basics, and the non-open-source data policy.

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
[Download PDF](pdfs/vignette-1.pdf){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-primary} &nbsp;&nbsp; [View on GitHub](https://github.com/robustport/PCRA/tree/main/vignettes){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

```{=html}
<iframe src="pdfs/vignette-1.pdf" width="100%" height="950px" style="border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>
```
